stemHtml: In a climb from FL60 to FL100 while maintaining constant IAS, the drag curve (1) _____ and the Drag vs. TAS curve (2) _____.

options.b: (1) does not move; (2) does not move
options.c: (1) moves up and to the right; (2) moves up and to the right
options.d: (1) does not move; (2) moves to the right
